commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `src/plugins/loader.ts` so failed plugin entry, setup-runtime entry, and CLI metadata root checks can fall back to a realpath that appears to belong to a host `openclaw` package.

PR surface: Source +38. Total +38 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence reproduction was run in this read-only review. The linked issue, docs, published package metadata, and current strict runtime loader provide a credible source-level reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are contributor real-behavior proof plus maintainer review of the correct plugin SDK security boundary, not a safe automated repair lane yet.
